title: check_extension_use: pos-0 EXTENSION_TESTS checked twice
description: Position-0 Words are checked against EXTENSION_TESTS in the if-let arm (line 242) and again in the linear scan over all Words (line 264). Double-check is harmless but redundant — the linear scan subsumes the arm-level check for EXTENSION_TESTS. Either remove the arm-level EXTENSION_TESTS check (relying on the scan) or skip position 0 in the scan. Clarify intent in a comment if kept.
